title.en: China-to-Guatemala Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入危地马拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入瓜地馬拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Guatemala COGUANOR standards and conformity context, CNEE distributed renewable generation and grid-interconnection requirements, distributor or AMM project gates, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, and Guatemala's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与危地马拉COGUANOR标准及合格评定背景、CNEE分布式可再生发电和并网要求、配电商或AMM项目门槛、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据，以及危地马拉60 Hz / 120-240 V电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與瓜地馬拉COGUANOR標準及合格評定背景、CNEE分散式可再生發電和併網要求、配電商或AMM項目門檻、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據，以及瓜地馬拉60 Hz / 120-240 V電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, COGUANOR conformity scope determination, CNEE interconnection approval, distributor approval, AMM market registration decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Guatemala COGUANOR standards adoption, CNEE technical norms, distributor requirements, AMM requirements for wholesale-market projects, and project-owner specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、COGUANOR合格评定范围裁定、CNEE并网批准、配电商批准、AMM批发市场登记决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行危地马拉COGUANOR标准采纳状况、CNEE技术规范、配电商要求、批发市场项目的AMM要求及项目业主规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、COGUANOR合格評定範圍裁定、CNEE併網批准、配電商批准、AMM批發市場登記決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行瓜地馬拉COGUANOR標準採納狀況、CNEE技術規範、配電商要求、批發市場項目的AMM要求及項目業主規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Guatemala, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming COGUANOR-adopted standards and conformity documentation expected for the product; (2) satisfying CNEE and distributor interconnection requirements for Generación Distribuida Renovable or, for larger market projects, applicable AMM connection and registration requirements; (3) providing IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (4) providing IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence configured for 60 Hz operation; (5) providing IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (6) reconfiguring and retesting protection settings for Guatemala's 120/240 V, 60 Hz grid. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is not automatically accepted and is typically 50 Hz / 220-380 V based.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口危地马拉时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认产品适用的COGUANOR采纳标准及合格评定文件；（2）满足CNEE和配电商对分布式可再生发电（Generación Distribuida Renovable）的并网要求，或大型市场项目适用的AMM接入和登记要求；（3）提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（4）提供按60 Hz运行配置的IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727并网接口证据；（5）提供IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据；（6）针对危地马拉120/240 V、60 Hz电网重新配置并复测保护整定。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据不会被自动接受，且通常基于50 Hz / 220-380 V电网条件。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口瓜地馬拉時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認產品適用的COGUANOR採納標準及合格評定文件；（2）滿足CNEE和配電商對分散式可再生發電（Generación Distribuida Renovable）的併網要求，或大型市場項目適用的AMM接入和登記要求；（3）提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（4）提供按60 Hz運行配置的IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727併網介面證據；（5）提供IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據；（6）針對瓜地馬拉120/240 V、60 Hz電網重新配置並複測保護整定。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據不會被自動接受，且通常基於50 Hz / 220-380 V電網條件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
